meta.provenance: SAMPLE SHAPE — AWAITING FIRST WHITELISTED CAPTURE. This artefact demonstrates the IMD district-forecast contract (field shapes per the IMD District Agromet Advisory / medium-range district forecast bulletin format). It is NOT an official IMD capture and must never be labelled CACHED_IMD_DATA. Replace via a whitelisted fetch (see docs/integrations/imd.md); the real whitelist gate is evidenced in imd-whitelist-evidence.json.
meta.officialFormatReference: IMD District Agromet Advisory Service (DAMS) bulletin structure + district medium-range forecast fields

days.condition: generally cloudy with light to moderate rain

warnings.type: thunderstorm with lightning and gusty winds

agrometAdvisoryShape: (shape) Light to moderate rainfall likely; postpone irrigation where rain is expected; ensure field drainage; monitor moisture-sensitive disease development after humid spells.
attribution: Source: India Meteorological Department, Ministry of Earth Sciences, Government of India
